ops.title: Codex (gpt-5.6-sol/luna) is hard usage-limit blocked until 2026-07-26 ~18:00 — route sol-table lanes to opus until then
ops.body:
On 2026-07-19 a codex lane failed immediately with a hard quota error: "You've hit your usage limit … try again at Jul 26th, 2026 5:58 PM." No partial work — turns fail before any tool call.

**Why:** the Models-table sol lanes (finder/refuter review, bounded implementation, recon-grade luna) silently return failure text instead of doing work; a codex-wrapper agent returns a non-null explanatory string, so null-based fallbacks in workflow scripts do NOT trigger.

**How to apply:** until 2026-07-26 ~18:00, route sol/luna-table lanes to opus xhigh (recon to sonnet per the table's Claude-only carve-out). If dispatching a codex lane anyway, have the wrapper return the literal token CODEX_UNAVAILABLE on quota errors and branch on it in the script. Delete this memory after the reset date passes.
